summary: PLOS backend + frontend tested end-to-end. Backend: 30/30 pytest tests passed (auth, profile, all CRUD resources, dashboard, career, health, AI advice with real Claude Sonnet 4.5, chat + history persistence, unauth checks, _id leakage). Frontend mobile (390x844): splash redirects to login -> login with test1@plos.app/test123 -> Home dashboard renders score=50, net worth=$511,900, monthly_in=$8,900, monthly_out=$3,410, cashflow=+$5,490, AI Decision cards populated. All 5 bottom tabs (Home/Finance/Career/Safety/More) navigate correctly. Finance shows Income/Expenses/Debts sections with seeded data. Career shows ATS score, 3 job applications with match-score bars. Safety 'Re-run' triggers Claude advice generation and renders real personalized text (~5s). More lists 8 modules (Investments, Business, Global Tools, Travel, Legal, Shopping, Health, AI Chatbot) + Settings. Chatbot sends a message and receives a real Claude response that references seeded data (Chase Sapphire $4,200 @ 22.99% APR). No critical bugs. Note: register email validator rejects .test TLD - test fixture updated to use @plos.app domain. Expo version drift detected (expo, expo-font, expo-router).

minor.issue: EmailStr (pydantic) rejects reserved TLDs like .test (gives 422). Document/restrict allowed test domains; works fine with real-looking domains.

ui_bugs.issue: Send icon button has no testID; only the input has placeholder-based selector. Add testID='chatbot-send' for reliable automation.
Pressing Enter on the chatbot input does NOT submit the message on web — only clicking the send button works. Consider adding onSubmitEditing={send} for better UX (web users naturally press Enter).

tabBarTestID prop is set (tab-home, tab-finance, …) but it does not propagate to a data-testid on the rendered web anchor — automation must fall back to text matching. Consider wrapping the tabBarIcon in a View with testID, or moving the testID to that element.

issues: Multiple console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated -> use boxShadow; props.pointerEvents deprecated -> use style.pointerEvents. Non-blocking on RN Web but noisy.

react_native_issues.issue: Version drift vs installed Expo SDK 54: expo@54.0.34 (expected ~54.0.35), expo-font@14.0.11 (expected ~14.0.12), expo-router@6.0.23 (expected ~6.0.24). Run `npx expo install --fix` (or use yarn equivalent) to align. Reference: /app/frontend/package.json

action_items: Modularize /app/backend/server.py (currently 990 lines) into routers (auth, finance, career, health, ai) per code-review guideline of <700 lines per file.
Add testID='chatbot-send' on the send button and onSubmitEditing on the chat TextInput in /app/frontend/app/chatbot.tsx so Enter key submits.
Run `npx expo install --fix` (or `yarn expo install --fix`) to align expo/expo-font/expo-router to the SDK 54 expected minors.
Replace deprecated shadow* style props with boxShadow and props.pointerEvents with style.pointerEvents to silence RN Web deprecation warnings.
Consider whitelisting test/dev email domains or relax email validation in /api/auth/register for QA seeding (currently 422 on .test TLD).
Optional: emit data-testid on bottom tab anchors (e.g., wrap tabBarIcon with View testID) so Playwright doesn't have to rely on visible label text.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~990 LOC — split into modules.
Backend correctly excludes Mongo _id via projection on all reads; no leakage verified by tests.
All env vars sourced via os.environ['...'] with no defaults — good fail-fast. JWT_SECRET stored in .env: rotate before prod.
AIDecision generated_at uses iso(now_utc()) — good; AI advice endpoint robustly parses Claude JSON with regex+fallback.
Frontend always reads EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (no hardcoded URLs).

success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested flows (login, dashboard, 5 tabs, AI advice on Safety, chatbot send + Claude reply)

seed_data_creation: No new seed; reused existing test1@plos.app user. Test suite also temporarily mutated career_profile (current_title -> 'TEST_Eng', ats_score=90) and health_profile (wellness_checkin_score=8). Re-run POST /api/seed-demo to restore canonical values.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL is https://life-os-hub-32.preview.emergentagent.com. Test creds in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. The pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_plos_api.py covers all CRUD + AI + chat in ~15s (AI calls take ~5s each). On the chatbot screen, the send button has NO testID; locate input by placeholder 'Ask PLOS anything...' and click the rightmost role=button on the page (or have the main agent add a testID). Bottom-tab data-testid attributes do not render — use anchor text ('Home'|'Finance'|'Career'|'Safety'|'More').
